title: LLM Cache Configuration
description: Configuration for the LLM Response Cache plugin

enabled.title: Enable Caching
enabled.description: Enable or disable the cache plugin

ttl_seconds.title: Default TTL (seconds)
ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live for cached responses in seconds

max_entry_size_kb.title: Max Entry Size (KB)
max_entry_size_kb.description: Maximum size of a single cache entry in kilobytes

max_cache_size_mb.title: Max Cache Size (MB)
max_cache_size_mb.description: Maximum total cache size in megabytes before LRU eviction

namespaces.title: Namespace Isolation
namespaces.description: Fields to include in cache key for isolation between tenants

normalize_prompts.title: Normalize Prompts
normalize_prompts.description: Normalize whitespace and JSON ordering before hashing to improve cache hit rate

expose_cache_key_header.title: Expose Cache Key Header
expose_cache_key_header.description: Include X-Cache-Key header in responses (useful for debugging)

report_interval_seconds.title: Stats Report Interval (seconds)
report_interval_seconds.description: How often to send cache statistics to the control plane (edge mode only)
